Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Nov-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Tionna G. Dolin of the law offices of Strategic Legal Practices, APC (310.929.4900) appears telephonically as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Jamie M. Cheng of the law offices of LeClairRyan LLP (415.913.4925) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by a Judge Pro Tem. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

PLAINTIFF JOSEPH MALTA, BERNICE MALTA'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One is GRANTED per the agreement by the parties in open court. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge Pro Tem: Steve Stein; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Carol Haraburda, CSR No. 8052, Bus. Tel: 925.360.6065, email: chreporter@comcast.net (D302/jpt)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Oct-18-2016 Continued To Nov-08-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

Neil Gieleghem, Esq., of Strategic Legal Practices, APC, Tel: (310) 929 4900, appearing for Plaintiffs Joseph Malta, et al., via Telephone Conference, CourtCall.
Jamie M. Cheng, Esq., of LeClailr Ryan LLP, Tel: (415) 913 4925, appearing for Defendant Ford Motor Company.

All parties have previously stipulated to Judge Pro Tem to hear this matter. No writen stipulation signed on Order of Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein.

RULING: ARGUED. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH MALTA, BERNICE MALTA'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One is continued to November 8, 2016 at 9:00 am, in Department 302. Counsel for Defendant Ford to prepare an Order.
Court indicated that the matter will be heard at 10:00 AM to accomodate counsel for Plaintiff to travel to the Court House.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings reported by: Carol Haraburda, CSR#8052, Tel: (925) 360 6065. (JPT/302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Sep-13-2016 Continued To Sep-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tionna Dolin, of Strategic Legal Practices, Tel. 310.929.4900, for plaintiffs;
Neil Gieleghem, of of Strategic Legal Practices, Tel. 310.929.4900, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
Jamie Cheng, of LeClair Ryan LLP, Tel. 415.913.4925, for defendants
Court Reporter: Sandy Carranza, CSR No. 7062, Tel. 415.893.1861.

Ruling: A R G U E D. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH MALTA, BERNICE MALTA Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One is continued to September 20, 2016. The parties shall meet and confer on outstanding issues with the protective order in place. The parties must submit a joint supplemental statement by email on or before September 19, 2016. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Defendant Ford Motor Companys Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tionna Dolin, of Strategic Legal Practices, Tel. 310.929.4900, for plaintiffs;
Neil Gieleghem, of of Strategic Legal Practices, Tel. 310.929.4900, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
Jamie Cheng, of LeClair Ryan LLP, Tel. 415.913.4925, for defendants;
Court Reporter: Sandy Carranza, CSR No. 7062, Tel. 415.893.1861.

Ruling: A R G U E D. DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's Motion For Protective Order is granted. The parties stipulate that the US District Court protective order for the Mytouch litigation is to be adapted for use in the within action. The moving party shall prepare the protective order and submit it to opposing party for approval, followed by return to Court for signature on or before September 15, 2016. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
